cybersecurityTypes.description: Protects network infrastructure from intrusions and attacks.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Network Security Engineer, SOC Analyst, Firewall Administrator
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: Yes – Start with basics of networking and firewalls

cybersecurityTypes.description: Secures websites and web applications from vulnerabilities.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Web App Pentester, Application Security Engineer, Bug Bounty Hunter
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: Yes – OWASP Top 10 is a good starting point

cybersecurityTypes.description: Protects individual devices (PCs, mobiles) from threats.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Endpoint Security Analyst, IT Security Administrator
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: Yes – Easy to understand via antivirus, EDR tools

cybersecurityTypes.description: Focuses on securing mobile apps and OS against malware and exploitation.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Mobile Security Researcher, Android Pentester, iOS Security Analyst

cybersecurityTypes.description: Secures cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, and GCP.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Cloud Security Engineer, Cloud Architect, DevSecOps Engineer
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: No – Requires cloud and networking background

cybersecurityTypes.description: Protects Internet of Things devices from remote attacks.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: IoT Security Analyst, Embedded Security Engineer
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: No – Needs hardware and embedded systems knowledge

cybersecurityTypes.description: Manages processes and decisions around protecting sensitive data.
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: Yes – Learn basic data handling and privacy

cybersecurityTypes.description: General protection of information assets from unauthorized access.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: InfoSec Analyst, Compliance Officer, ISO Auditor
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: Yes – A good entry point into cybersecurity

cybersecurityTypes.description: Involves secure coding, code review, and protecting software during development.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: AppSec Engineer, Secure Code Reviewer, Software Security Consultant

cybersecurityTypes.description: Controls user access to systems and data.
cybersecurityTypes.beginnerFriendly: Moderate – Learn access control models first

cybersecurityTypes.description: Uses encryption to protect data confidentiality and integrity.
Detects and responds to security breaches and threats.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Incident Responder, SOC Analyst, Digital Forensic Expert

cybersecurityTypes.description: Simulates attacks to find weaknesses before attackers do.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Penetration Tester, Red Team Operator, Ethical Hacker

cybersecurityTypes.description: Defends systems and detects attacks in real time.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: Blue Team Analyst, Threat Hunter, SOC Analyst

cybersecurityTypes.description: Investigates cybercrimes by analyzing digital evidence.
Ensures security practices comply with legal and regulatory standards.
cybersecurityTypes.jobRoles: GRC Analyst, Compliance Manager, Risk Analyst
